title: Persistent-ID reuse policy (ROR/ORCID/Funder Registry/NCT/DOI; mint only Effort IDs on w3id.org/PURL)
context: An open, source-linked map of the Ewing Sarcoma research ecosystem (organizations, grants/awards, research efforts, aggregate registered-study records, and public outputs). The project must reuse external persistent identifiers rather than mint its own, except for ResearchEffort IDs which need a host-independent namespace decoupled from any steward.
objective: Define the persistent-ID reuse policy: reuse ROR/ORCID/Crossref Funder Registry/NCT/DOI, and mint only ResearchEffort IDs under a w3id.org/PURL namespace owned by the project.
acceptanceCriteria: Persistent-ID reuse policy committed: reuse ROR/ORCID/Crossref Funder Registry/NCT/DOI rather than minting.
Only ResearchEffort IDs are minted, under a host-independent w3id.org/PURL namespace decoupled from any steward.
ID minting/governance rules documented (format, stability, project (not host) ownership).
output: docs/identifier-policy.md documenting the persistent-ID reuse + minting policy, committed via PR.
